channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: ETH eyes a breakout or a slip: near-term bias tilts bearish even as targets edge toward 2,400. 🚦 Will resistance break or fade? https://Blockchain.News/news/20260409-price-prediction-eth-targets-2400-by-may-2026-as #ETH #Crypto #Priceaction

item.title: 🔥 Conflux v3.0.3 beefs up stability with seven bug fixes and CIP-166 Count Leading Zeros, no forced upgrade required—but upgrading is wise. https://Blockchain.News/news/conflux-cfx-v3-0-3-node-upgrade-cip-166-opcode #CryptoNews #CFX #Blockchain
